subcodes.first_line: O Shukru'llah! There hath befallen the Wronged One that which hath caused the Rock to cry out and the Divine Tree to raise its voice by reason of that which hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شکرالله قد ورد علی المظلوم ما صاحت به الصخره و نادت السدره بما ورد علی من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
